LanguageData.RI_CurseCureBook_Description.rulePack.ru:
• desc->This [writingQualityAdjective] [bookType] [follows], compiled by a [psycaster] after [heOrShe] [storyStruggles]. [writingQualitySentence]. [maybe_date].\n\nAfter finishing this book, the reader can master the art of curse cleansing. It is a one-time inheritance and will vanish once fully read.
  • follows->systematically explains the principles of purification and curse removal
  • follows->fully records rites and key techniques for breaking malignant curses
  • follows->is structured around the four methods: suppress, purify, dispel, and seal
  • follows->deeply analyzes curse corruption and paths of counteraction
  • follows->organizes purification procedures and taboos in rigorous detail
  • follows->summarizes self-protection and curse-cleansing steps in calamity zones
  • heOrShe->he
  • heOrShe->she
  • storyStruggles->traveling through lands afflicted by calamity
  • storyStruggles->repeatedly validating these techniques in practical purification work
  • storyStruggles->reconstructing a full curse-breaking framework from ancient records
  • storyStruggles->revising key rites through firsthand experience
  • storyStruggles->combining medicine and psychic practice into a unified method
  • psycaster->Daoist cultivator
  • psycaster->purification scholar
  • psycaster->cursebreaker
  • psycaster->wandering banisher
  • psycaster->warding mentor
  • psycaster->master of cleansing arts
  • writingQualityAdjective(quality==6)->meticulously structured and precisely argued
  • writingQualityAdjective(quality==5)->mature in insight and clear in organization
  • writingQualityAdjective(quality==4)->solid in content and clear in expression
  • writingQualityAdjective(quality==3)->complete in structure and plain in style
  • writingQualityAdjective(quality==2)->scattered in points and barely readable
  • writingQualityAdjective(quality==1)->hastily written with many errors
  • writingQualityAdjective(quality==0)->obscure, chaotic, and nearly unusable
  • writingQualitySentence(quality[greater_than]4)->This book [excellentDesc][excellentExtra]
  • writingQualitySentence(quality[less_than]5,quality[greater_than]1)->This book [decentDesc][decentExtra]
  • writingQualitySentence(quality[less_than]2)->This book [awfulDesc][awfulExtra]
  • excellentDesc->breaks down complex rites into executable steps
  • excellentDesc->offers a clear explanation of curse transmission mechanisms
  • excellentDesc->achieves a strong balance between theory and practice
  • excellentDesc->uses accurate case references with high reproducibility
  • excellentExtra->and can almost be used directly as a field manual for purification
  • excellentExtra->and even provides reliable responses for high-risk cases
  • excellentExtra->and significantly improves the success rate of curse removal
  • decentDesc->provides a workable foundation for purification practice
  • decentDesc->covers identification and handling of common curses
  • decentDesc->offers clear guidance for beginners
  • decentExtra->but still lacks depth in extreme situations
  • decentExtra->while leaving some decisions to the reader’s judgment
  • decentExtra->and remains somewhat conservative for compound curses
  • awfulDesc->mixes terminology and breaks logical flow in many places
  • awfulDesc->is vague about key steps and hard to execute
  • awfulDesc->selects cases arbitrarily without solid validation
  • awfulExtra->so following it recklessly may cause purification failure
  • awfulExtra->and it fails to cover core principles of curse handling
  • awfulExtra->with some advice presenting obvious risks
  • maybe_date->
  • maybe_date->This volume was first transcribed [date_form].
  • maybe_date->Its compilation can be traced back to [date_form].
  • maybe_date->No precise date of authorship is recorded.
  • date_form->recently
  • date_form->decades ago
  • date_form->in [date]
  • date_form->in the [date_season]
  • bookType(p=4)->grimoire of curse removal
  • bookType(p=3)->purification handbook
  • bookType(p=2)->reference on cleansing arts
  • bookType->record of banishment techniques
  • bookType->treatise on warding rites
